overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic dystopian city at dusk. The journey transitions from an open neon-lit street with parked vehicles into a dark, covered underpass corridor with artificial lighting and steady traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with neon signage and parked vehicles

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange-paved sidewalk past parked futuristic vehicles and scattered trash

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red jacket and sunglasses walking toward camera, passing closely on the right

entered.detail: blue neon sign with white text mounted on building facade
row of white and dark futuristic vehicles parked along the curb
distinctive orange-yellow tiled sidewalk with geometric patterns
overhead walkway connecting buildings across the street
large vertical billboard displaying a monochrome face advertisement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city street at dusk, with the camera following a character walking along an orange-patterned sidewalk. Neon signs including a prominent 'Nukoff' sign illuminate the left side, while parked futuristic vehicles line the curb. The atmosphere is cyberpunk with mixed natural and artificial lighting, and sparse pedestrian traffic moves in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway overpass

events.description: entering the shadow of the concrete overpass structure, transitioning from open street to covered walkway
ambient light drops significantly as the overpass ceiling blocks remaining natural light

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the massive concrete overpass, approaching a pedestrian crossing signal

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow jacket walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: massive dark concrete structure of the elevated highway overhead
thick cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overpass
stream of futuristic cars with headlights on driving along the road
illuminated yellow walk sign hanging from the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the shadow of a massive concrete overpass, transitioning from the open street to a sheltered walkway. The lighting dims to low artificial levels while pedestrian density increases. Vehicles with glowing headlights pass by on the right, and the camera approaches a yellow pedestrian crossing signal suspended from the overpass ceiling.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed urban corridor under elevated roadway with vertical lighting panels

events.description: turning right to enter the deep covered corridor with vertical light panels

agents.ego_description: walking through the dimly lit corridor with steady vehicle traffic visible to the right

entered.detail: tall glowing rectangular light fixtures mounted on the left wall emitting bright white light
smooth dark concrete walls of the enclosed passageway
glowing light at the far end of the corridor indicating the exit

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a long, enclosed concrete corridor beneath the overpass. The space is illuminated by vertical light panels on the left wall while vehicles continue to pass on the right. The ground transitions to dark concrete with yellow tactile strips, and pedestrians walk toward the camera from the distant bright exit. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with artificial lighting and enclosed urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a vibrant, neon-lit city street into the oppressive enclosure of a concrete underpass. It begins by following a character along an orange-patterned sidewalk at dusk, where glowing signs like the Nukoff advertisement and parked futuristic vehicles line the open road. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts into the shadow of a massive overpass, causing the natural light to dim and the environment to become more crowded with pedestrians and passing headlights. The camera then turns right, transitioning from the sheltered walkway into a long, enclosed concrete corridor illuminated by vertical light panels. Finally, the perspective pushes deeper into the artificial glow of the tunnel, moving over dark concrete and yellow tactile strips toward a distant, bright exit.
